heroTagline.default: The first thing if you are new here.

coverSubtitle.default: A somatic self-audit, in seven quiet questions.

whyBody.default:
The Nervous System Decoder is the first thing offered to anyone who finds Anna Lou Wellness. Free. Always free.

It explains the three primary states of your inner guidance system in plain language. Helps you identify which state you are in right now. Gives you three immediate practices, one for each state, you can use today, anywhere, without equipment.

It was made free because understanding your inner world is not a luxury. It is the foundation. Without it, nothing else on this site makes sense. With it, everything starts to make sense — the patterns, the reactions, the relationships, the exhaustion.

insideItems.default:
A short introduction to the inner guidance system in plain language
Seven self-audit questions with space to write
A simple key for reading your own answers
Three small somatic practices to start with, today
A suggested next step, gently. No pressure.

formMicrocopy.default: No spam. Unsubscribe in one click. We never share your email.

successTitle.default: Your Decoder is on its way.

successBody.default:
Look for an email from Anna in the next few minutes. If it is not there, check spam or promotions.

In the meantime, if you want to go further, here is what comes next.
